headline: Micron, Nvidia, Netflix, SK Hynix, Intuitive Surgical, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: FEATURE  Tech was hit again on Friday by the worsening selloff in chip makers and other AI stocks.  Advanced Micro Devices declined 2.1% and Intel dropped 3%. Applied Materials was down 4.7% and Corning fell 3%.

headline: AMD Falls 5%, Intel Drops 4%, NVIDIA Slides 3% Before Recovering as Rotation Hits Semiconductor Stocks
summary: A wave of selling swept through semiconductor stocks Friday as investors began questioning whether the AI spending boom can justify chip valuations built on optimism alone. The forces driving this rotation reveal cracks in the narrative that sent some semis up triple digits this year.

headline: Chip Stocks Are Having Their Worst Month Since 2008: This Analyst Says Buy the Reset
summary: The iShares Semiconductor ETF is down 18.6% in July, its worst month since 2008. BofA's Vivek Arya calls it a summer reset, not a reversal.
